title: workspaces — HTTP middleware
description: HTTP middleware this module registers. Each middleware is aliased in `WorkspacesServiceProvider::boot()` via `Router::aliasMiddleware()` and composed on route groups declared in routes.json.

middleware.description: Resolves the current Application (from Host header) and, on workspace subdomains, the current Workspace. On central + platform-admin hosts it binds only the Application. On unknown hosts it 404s the request.
sideEffects: Binds `Application` singleton into the request-scoped container (always).
Registers a terminating hook that calls `fireEnd($workspace)` on response end for Octane symmetry.

middleware.description: Refuses cross-workspace sessions. Runs AFTER `auth:sanctum` so the caller is resolved, then asserts `auth()->user()->workspace_id === resolvedWorkspace()->id`. Throws `WorkspaceException::crossWorkspaceAccess()` (400 + Alert severity) on mismatch.
Rejects workspace subdomains on routes that must run on the central or platform-admin hosts. Prevents a self-serve register call from accidentally landing inside a workspace scope.

Same as resolve.workspace but does NOT 404 when the host is unknown. Used on the public-workspace read endpoints (public branding preview, newsletter subscribe) where an anonymous request may hit a not-yet-verified custom domain.

api.version.reason: API versioning is a cross-cutting concern owned by the versioning module. This module used to ship EnforceApiVersion; now downstream routes middleware `versioning.resolve` instead. See modules/versioning/middleware.json.
